model.name: Explainable Elo + Form Regression v0.1
model.trainedOn: International results CSV, 1872-present; features weighted on post-2021 form and full-history Elo.

sources.name: Weather adapter
sources.url: 未配置：建议接入 Open-Meteo / WeatherAPI / Visual Crossing

sources.name: Bookmaker odds adapter
sources.url: 未配置：建议接入 The Odds API / Sportradar / Opta 授权数据

sources.name: Lineup and player status adapter
sources.url: 未配置：建议接入 Sportradar / Stats Perform / API-Football 授权数据

features: Elo rating from full historical international results
Recent form points per match since 2021
Host boost for United States, Mexico and Canada
Venue climate baseline and altitude context
User-adjustable bookmaker, lineup, weather and player state signals
Poisson expected goals for scoreline distribution
limitations: Open public data does not include live injuries, confirmed squads, betting market movement, or xG unless a paid provider is added.
Future fixtures depend on the upstream public schedule dataset; verify against FIFA before public launch.
Predictions are for entertainment and analysis, not betting advice.

venueSignal.climate: 高海拔，控球和体能衰减更敏感
venueSignal.weatherStatus: 实时天气通常只能在赛前 7-10 天可靠获取，当前使用场地气候基线
venueSignal.bookmakerStatus: 未配置赔率 API，接入后可加入市场隐含概率与盘口变化
venueSignal.lineupStatus: 未配置阵容/伤停 API，接入后可加入首发、伤停和球员状态
venueSignal.freshness: 赛程和历史比赛已实时拉取；天气、赔率、阵容等待外部授权源
